{"society_power": 3.5, "state_power": 6.5, "society_change": -1.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "1972-73 one-party state; copper collapse hollows state capacity", "reasoning": "The 1972-73 one-party entrenchment and co-optation of associations sharply curtailed autonomous civil society (only the mineworkers' union retained real strength), while the post-1974 copper crash, mounting debt, and border closure hollowed out state fiscal and administrative capacity even as despotic party control expanded\u2014a net slight decline in effective state power."}
